title: 'Files' tab too narrow - UX/UI
excerpt: Serious UX/UI problem. The ‘Files’ tab is too narrow and has a flyout menu button (…) covering half of it. It leaves you a very small space to click on. This tab should be much wider - it is very annoying and hard to ope…

posts.author: jebuda (Joseph Buda)
posts.cookedHtml: Serious UX/UI problem. The ‘Files’ tab is too narrow and has a flyout menu button (…) covering half of it. It leaves you a very small space to click on. This tab should be much wider - it is very annoying and hard to open. I tend to use this tab a lot, and hope this will be fixed quickly.
